name: White Coconut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and line the bottoms of two 9x1 1/2 inch cake pans with wax paper.
Place sifted flour, baking powder, and salt on a sheet of wax paper.
Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat egg whites in a medium-sized bowl using an electric mixer on high
until foamy. Add vinegar, then beat in 1 cup sugar (1 tablespoon at a time)
until meringue forms soft peaks.
3. Beat butter in a large bowl until creamy. Add remaining 1 cup sugar and vanilla.
Beat in until combined.
4. Gradually add sifted dry ingredients with milk to the butter mixture, stirring
between each addition until batter is smooth. Gently fold in meringue.
Pour batter into prepared pans.
5. Bake for 30 minutes or until centers spring back when lightly pressed with a fingertip.
Let cool in pans on wire racks for 5 minutes. Remove from pans and peel off wax paper.
Cool completely before proceeding.
6. Spread Boiled White Frosting between layers and over the top and sides of the cake.
Sprinkle generously with flaked coconut.
